rationale: The cited paper appears only in the General Discussion as part of a grouped citation (with Dalton and Spiller 2012) to illustrate a broad point that concrete planning or multiple goals can highlight difficulty and undermine goal pursuit. The citing paper does not use this specific study to build hypotheses, design measures, or structure its core theoretical model on duration framing and personal relevance. Because the reference serves as background support rather than a distinct, paper-specific building block, the citation is mention-level.
